goal: Add comprehensive unit and integration tests for all batch processing safeguards

tasks.name: Unit tests for BatchProcessingLog entity and repository
tasks.action: Test BatchProcessingStatus enum values. Test BatchProcessingLog entity creation and builder. Test repository methods with Mockito: findByProcessingMonth, existsByProcessingMonth, findTopByStatusOrderByProcessingMonthDesc.

tasks.name: Unit tests for LoanBatchServiceImpl safeguards
tasks.action: Test all safeguards: idempotency rejection (7.4), sequential enforcement rejection and success (7.5), same-month skip (7.6), threshold day filtering (7.3), warnings population (7.7), batch log lifecycle (7.8), configurable day check (7.2), and happy-path full processing.

tasks.name: Controller tests for updated batch endpoints
tasks.action: Test processBatch with auto-determined month, explicit month, idempotency 409 response, sequential 409 response, unauthorized 403, and warnings in response body. Use @WebMvcTest with mocked LoanBatchService.

commitMessage: test(loan-batch): add tests for batch processing safeguards
